creator: handy@physics.montana.edu
text:
Window Maker upgrade.  To confuse the issue, they've ripped the generic
themes and a bunch of Icons out of the main distro and put them in a 
separate "WindowMaker-extra-0.1.tar.gz" file.  I've looked at this, and
I think it's a stupid idea:  we now have a source file, a data file, and
an 'extras' file, and the latter two don't get installed in the same 
manner.  Sigh.

If the committer-to-be would review my kludges to do this, I'd be most
appreciative.  A simple problem, but I'm at a loss for the best way to 
approach it.  I wouldn't be surprised if this disappears before too long.
